description: Every PHI access lands as an append-only, hash-chained record with actor, subject, and reason; the chain verifies; the trail exports independently with the export itself audited.

cases.name: an allowed chart view emits a chained access record with actor, subject, and reason
a multi-record tenant-day chain verifies end to end
an audited operation commits the operation and its audit record together
the trail exports independently: chain heads included, export audited with recipient and purpose
